results.title: Ajax loom for Shelbourne in Conference League after first leg blitz
results.description: Despite allowing their Estonian guests a sliver of hope by conceding just before half-time, a second goal for winger Seán Moore within two minutes of the restart restored the cushion

results.title: 20 predictions for Dallas Cowboys training camp: Time for a drama-free Oxnard trip?
Turkish governor fired for wearing tight cycling shorts that were ‘too snug’
results.description: Mehmet Fatih Cicekli, the governor of Ardahan province in eastern Turkey, was removed from his post by a presidential decree signed by President Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

results.title: MLB Highlights: Twins 3, Guardians 1 (F/12)
results.description: Trevor Larnach and Luke Keaschall both drove in a run each in the top of the 12th as the Minnesota Twins defeated the Cleveland Guardians in extra innings.

results.title: Greg Sankey doesn't favor SEC breakaway, but options being explored amid 'real frustrations'
results.description: SEC commissioner Greg Sankey spoke to The Athletic about why the conference would make its own rules. Here's what we've learned.

results.title: An anecdote that illustrates Lane Hutson’s great confidence
results.description: To be a good National League player, you need talent. We all know it's not rocket science. But it's not just that, either. It also takes confidence: a guy who doesn't believe in himself will never be able to reach his full potential.

results.title: Blackstone COO: AI boom is 'different' from previous investment cycles
results.description: Erik McGregor/Getty Images Blackstone does not expect growing competition to drive down returns on its new investments in AI infrastructure, at least not anytime soon, said COO Jon Gray. Speaking during the firm’s Q2 earnings call, Gray said demand for data centers, chips and the power to supply them is so great that the risk of oversupply and a subsequent collapse in valuations is minimal. “It’s very hard to get the chips today, it’s very hard to get the power, it’s very hard to get the entitle
